name: Peter
oracleText:
Vigilance
Other creatures you control have ward {1}.
Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, draw a card.
flavorText: "Thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church." — Matthew 16:18
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Primacy of Saint Peter" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Rock of Confession

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Primacy of Saint Peter
classics.sourceNotes: Tissot’s Peter scene gives the confession card a canonical apostolic treatment.
